1: Preserve me from the violent man;
2: Continually are they gathered together for for war.
3: Adders' poison is is under their lips. Selah. Selah.
4: Preserve me from the violent man; Who have purposed to overthrow my goings.
5: They have set gins for me. Selah. Selah.
6: Hear the voice of my supplications, O LORD LORD .
7: Thou hast covered my head in the day of battle.
8: Further not his wicked device; lest lest they exalt themselves. Selah. Selah.
9: Let the mischief of their own lips cover them.
10: Let them be cast into the fire; Into deep pits, that they rise not up again.
11: Evil shall hunt the violent man to overthrow him him .
12: And And the right of the poor.
13: The upright shall dwell in thy presence.
